ai_summary: Here is a 2-3 sentence executive summary of the document:  3P Land Holdings Limited has announced a routine book closure from July 24 to August 1, 2026, ahead of its 61st Annual General Meeting on August 1, 2026, to determine shareholder eligibility for voting. While this is a standard regulatory compliance, a significant red flag is the inclusion of an extraneous scrip code (PDUMJEIND) and associated corporate email belonging to a different entity in the contact details, indicating potential administrative oversight in this regulatory filing.
